scripts.test: pnpm --dir apps/web run test && pnpm run test:api
scripts.test:api: uv run --project apps/api python -m unittest discover -s apps/api/tests -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.check: pnpm run test && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.contracts:openapi: uv run --project apps/api python -m halligalli_api.export_openapi contracts/openapi.json
scripts.contracts:check: pnpm run contracts:openapi && pnpm run contracts:types && git diff --exit-code -- contracts/openapi.json apps/web/src/multiplayer/rest.generated.ts
